name: wikindie
description: Filesystem-backed wiki for notes, docs, and lightweight planning.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w packages/backend" "npm run dev -w packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend && npm run copy:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/backend && npm run typecheck -w packages/frontend
